song.title: I Will Boast
song.presentation: V1 C V1 C B C
song.lyrics: [V1] . D 1) Let not the wise man |boast in his wisdom . D5/B A Or let the strong man |boast in his strength . D5 Let not the rich man |boast in his riches . D5/B A But let the humble come and give thanks . G Asus To the One who made us, |to the One who saved us [C] Chorus . D Asus I will boast in the Lord my God . Bm Asus I will boast in the One Who's worthy . D Asus I will boast in the Lord my God . Bm Asus E7 G D I will boast in the One Who's worthy, He's worthy [B] Bridge . D5 A Bm G I will make my boast in Christ alone . D5 A Bm G I will make my boast in Christ alone (x2)
